_comment: Authoritative KPI map for /stock:model engagement-modifier (ABA-66). Tickers not present here route to status='no_kpi_mapping'. Every change is recorded in engagement_kpi_map.CHANGELOG.md.

secondary_kpi.name: ad_impressions
secondary_kpi.long_name: Ad impressions delivered across Family of Apps

NFLX.reason: Stopped quarterly disclosure of paid-sub net adds in Q1 2025. Q1 2026 shareholder letter contains only qualitative engagement language ('primary internal quality metric hit an all-time high') and headline revenue (+16% YoY) / operating-income (+18% YoY) — no leading-indicator engagement KPI suitable for the modifier. Revenue-on-revenue is circular (the modifier perturbs Y1 revenue using consensus already informed by the latest print).
NFLX.revisit_when: NFLX reintroduces a quarterly engagement disclosure (e.g. view-hours per active member) OR the bi-annual Engagement Report cadence becomes per-quarter.

GOOGL.reason: No quarterly Search-CPM or impression-volume disclosure in 10-Q or earnings press release. 'Paid clicks' and 'cost-per-click' are disclosed as YoY % only, not absolute values; YouTube revenue is a segment line but not an engagement KPI. No defensible primary mapping for v1.
GOOGL.revisit_when: Alphabet expands segment disclosure to per-quarter clicks/CPC absolutes OR YouTube engagement (view-hours) becomes quarterly.
